name: label
title: Label
description: Accessible labels with required, optional, subtext, and a trailing slot for Badge or meta.

api.description: Accessible label for form controls. Supports required and optional marks, subtext, and a trailing meta slot.

props.name: htmlFor
props.description: Id of the labeled control.

props.name: children
props.description: Label title content.

props.name: required
props.description: Shows a decorative required mark after the title. Wins over optional when both are set.

props.name: requiredVariant
props.description: Required mark style. "asterisk" shows *. "text" shows required or (required). Both use --label-required.

props.name: requiredColor
props.description: Required mark color. Prefer tokens such as var(--destructive). Sets --label-required on this label.

props.name: optional
props.description: Shows a decorative optional mark after the title. Ignored when required is true.

props.name: optionalVariant
props.description: Optional mark style. "text" shows optional or (optional). "asterisk" shows *.

props.name: brackets
props.description: Wraps text marks in parentheses: (required) and (optional). Set false for required or optional without brackets. No effect on asterisk marks.

props.name: subtext
props.description: Secondary supporting line under the title row.

props.name: trailing
props.description: Right-aligned meta on the title row. Pass Badge, a character count, or any custom node.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the label root.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles. Can also set --label-required for the required mark color.

props.name: …label attributes
props.description: All native label props.

props.name: data-df="label"
props.description: Root label element.

props.name: data-df="label-row"
props.description: Title row that hosts the title group and trailing slot.

props.name: data-df="label-title"
props.description: Title group with label text and required or optional mark.

props.name: data-df="label-text"
props.description: Primary label text.

props.name: data-df="label-required"
props.description: Required mark. Uses --label-required. data-variant is asterisk or text.

props.name: data-df="label-optional"
props.description: Optional mark. data-variant is asterisk or text.

props.name: data-df="label-trailing"
props.description: Trailing meta slot on the title row.

props.name: data-df="label-subtext"
props.description: Supporting line under the title row.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --foreground
props.description: Label title color.

props.name: --muted-foreground
props.description: Optional mark, subtext, and trailing color.

props.name: --label-required
props.description: Required mark color for asterisk and text variants. Override globally or via requiredColor.

props.name: --destructive
props.description: Default source for --label-required.
